name: Atlantic Bluefin Tuna
conservationEfforts: ICCAT quotas dramatically reduced catch. Electronic monitoring of fishing vessels. Eastern Atlantic population recovering strongly under management.
description: One of the largest bony fish, reaching 4.6 meters and 680 kg. They can maintain body temperature above surrounding water and cross the Atlantic in under 60 days. A single fish sold for $3.1 million at auction in 2019.
